metadata.description: PaymentProcessor and RefundService with high-confidence analysis (0.91-0.95). Multiple edge types used. All Level 1 checks pass.

concepts.name: PaymentProcessor
concepts.description: Orchestrates payment transactions by building a charge request from the order total and currency, submitting it to the Stripe API with a unique idempotency key derived from the order ID, and publishing a payment.completed or payment.failed event to the internal event bus for downstream analytics and fulfilment services.

code_references.semantic_anchor: class PaymentProcessor orchestrates Stripe charge flow

concepts.name: RefundService
concepts.description: Handles refund computation by verifying the original transaction falls within the 14-day refund window, calculating partial refund amounts for pro-rated subscriptions, and invoking the Stripe Refund endpoint with idempotency keys to prevent duplicate refunds on retried requests.

code_references.semantic_anchor: class RefundService validates and executes Stripe refunds
